title: Minecraft Bedrock Pack Manifest
description: The manifest.json file contains the basic information about a pack that Minecraft needs to identify it, including header metadata, modules, and optional dependencies, capabilities, and metadata.

format_version.description: The syntax version used in the manifest file. This may be 1 for skin packs or 2 for resource, behavior, and world templates. Version 3 is a new update of the manifest currently in preview.
